title: poterium dodecandrum
intro: Poterium dodecandrum, also known as burnet saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Poterium dodecandrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy in traditional medicine.
